raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1414 addresses the lucrative crime of sex trafficking and aims to increase penalties for those who purchase children for sex.",
    "Soliciting or buying children 15 and under for sex can only be charged as a wobbler, either a misdemeanor or a felony.",
    "Buying 16 and 17 year old children is only punishable as a misdemeanor.",
    "Felony charges related to purchasing sex from children carry only possible jail time and are not prison eligible.",
    "Only perpetrators with a previous conviction of purchasing sex from a child 15 or under must register as a tier one sex offender under specific conditions."
  ]
}
```
